steps.title: Identify the coefficient
steps.content:
In the equation

$$4.65x+6.25y=921.75$$

$x$ is the number of smaller containers sold. The coefficient of $x$ is the dollar amount for each smaller container.

steps.title: Read the unit price
steps.content: The coefficient attached to $x$ is $4.65$, so the smaller-container price is $4.65$ dollars. The answer is 4.65.
